news.title: Tesla (TSLA) Teams With Sunrun And Renew Home On A 16 Gigawatt Virtual Power Plant
news.summary: Tesla, Sunrun, and Renew Home have agreed to combine residential batteries, rooftop solar, and smart devices into a nationwide virtual power plant. The alliance targets more than 16 gigawatts of flexible capacity for utilities and large data and AI operators across the U.S. The partnership aims to use existing home energy assets to support grid reliability while creating new revenue streams for participating households. news.title: Strategy’s Turnaround Plan Includes Stock Buyback, Bitcoin Sales and More Reserves
news.summary: Michael Saylor’s    Strategy  plans to buy back stock and sell bitcoin among many moves aimed at stemming the loss of confidence in the crypto-hoarding company.  Strategy said Monday it would repurchase as much as $1 billion of its preferred shares and up to $1 billion of its Class A common stock.  It also said it might sell bitcoin to raise up to $1.25 billion in cash to help cover the dividend payments on its preferred stock and the interest on outstanding debt, as well as to fund its share-repurchase program and cash reserve.

news.title: Tech rebound lifts Dow to record, yen hits 40-year low against dollar
